calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-16-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-16-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Sandi Petritsch, CSR #11684.

Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Capital One Bank.
No appearance by defendant David A. Clements.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on February 21, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, June 16, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Capital One Bank, and against defendant David A. Clements as follows:

Damages/Principal - $3,148.42.
Prejudgment Interest - $541.94.
Attorney's Fees - $690.00.
Costs - $304.00, for a total of $4,684.36.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-27-2008 Continued To Jun-16-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-21-2008 Set For Trial On May-27-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
